title: Artifact Provenance Block
description: Provenance block stamped onto every formal BacktestResult, validation step output, and registry publication starting with PR 1. Older artifacts that pre-date this contract are legacy_artifact=true; they remain readable for comparison but cannot pass formal release gates.

legacy_artifact.description: True for artifacts produced before PR 1 landed (i.e. missing one or more of the formal provenance fields below). Legacy artifacts can be viewed and compared historically but cannot pass formal release gates.

execution_profile_id.description: Filled in by PR 3. Until then this field may be null and formal runs use a transitional 'pre_pr3_default' value.

execution_profile_hash.description: sha256 hex digest computed from the ExecutionProfile excluding profile_hash itself. Filled in by PR 3.
